overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a vibrant meadow with colorful wildflowers, crossing a shallow stream, and following a dirt path alongside the water with snow-capped mountains in the background. The scene transitions from a flower-filled grassland with distant castle ruins to a riverside trail with panoramic mountain views.

scene_state.functional_zone: wildflower meadow with distant castle ruins

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through a colorful meadow with purple and yellow wildflowers, heading toward the tree line

entered.detail: stone castle ruins visible on the right horizon against the tree line
dense patches of purple and yellow wildflowers covering the meadow grass
narrow stream running parallel to the path on the right side
dense evergreen forest forming the backdrop of the meadow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through a vibrant wildflower meadow under a partly cloudy sky. Castle ruins stand visible on the right horizon while a stream runs parallel on the right side. The landscape is dominated by colorful flowers and distant pine forests.

events.description: snow-capped mountains become visible on the left horizon as the camera moves forward

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the meadow as the landscape opens to reveal a dramatic mountain range on the left

entered.detail: tall snow-covered mountain peaks rising on the left side of the frame
tall dead tree with bare branches standing prominently on the right

segments.scene_description: As Geralt moves deeper into the meadow, the castle ruins fade into the distance and snow-capped mountains emerge on the left horizon. A prominent dead tree stands on the right while the stream draws closer. The wildflowers continue to dominate the foreground.

events.description: character enters the shallow stream, creating splashes as he wades through the water
character exits the stream onto the opposite bank and rocky shore

agents.ego_description: carefully wading through the shallow stream, water splashing around his boots, then climbing onto the opposite bank

entered.detail: rocks and stones visible in the shallow stream bed

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches and enters the stream, wading through shallow water with visible rocks beneath the surface. The snow-capped mountains now dominate the center background. After crossing, he exits onto the opposite bank where wooden fence posts become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside dirt path with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: following the dirt path alongside the stream with snow-capped mountains visible ahead and to the left

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail running alongside the stream
weathered wooden fence posts lining the right side of the path along the stream

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt walking along a dirt path beside the stream, with wooden fence posts lining the right bank. The snow-capped mountains create a dramatic backdrop ahead while the stream flows parallel on the right. The landscape transitions to a more defined trail through open grassland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant wildflower meadow that gradually transitions into a riverside trail set against a backdrop of towering mountains. It begins with Geralt walking through colorful grasslands under a partly cloudy sky, with castle ruins visible on the right horizon beside a parallel stream. As he moves deeper into the meadow, the ruins fade away and snow-capped peaks emerge on the left horizon, while a prominent dead tree appears on the right. The camera then follows him as he wades through the shallow, rocky waters of the stream, shifting the focus toward the mountains that now dominate the center background. Finally, the scene opens onto a defined dirt path lined with wooden fence posts, where Geralt continues his journey alongside the flowing water under the dramatic mountain vista.
